blockedItems: Mobile real-device runtime smoke remains blocked until an EAS development build is executed, installed, and opened on a physical device.
EAS Android development build execution is blocked because local EAS CLI is not logged in; PR #60 recorded BLOCKED / EAS LOGIN UNAVAILABLE with no build URL, artifact, or physical-device install.
Mobile Figma Phase 27A merged the first dark-theme Figma implementation pass, but BlueStacks emulator visual verification is required before continuing to Phase 27B.
Light/day theme cleanup is deferred; the current approved visual target is dark luxury theme first.
Vercel build-rate-limit affected PR #43; Phase 10 was merged with accepted infrastructure quota risk after local/static validation passed.

PR #59 established the EAS development build path documentation, but no EAS development build or real-device smoke was executed.
PR #60 recorded the Phase 26 EAS development build attempt as BLOCKED / EAS LOGIN UNAVAILABLE; Phase 27 must resolve EAS login/project access before rerunning the Android development build.
